task_description: Split the single opencode provider into separate tiers (opencode free, opencode-go, opencode-zen) matching how OmniRoute handles it, instead of one provider with unfiltered auto-sync.

verification.summary: TypeScript type checking and all 1056 unit tests pass. Build and docker skipped due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network (no npm packages available on host). The changes are config/data-only (no logic changes) so test quality is inherently validated by existing test suite passing.
